title: Suite CLI error envelope (CLI contract v1 §3)

ok.description: Always false in an error envelope; success documents are the verb's own shape.

code.description: Stable machine-readable code. API surface: renaming or removing a code is a breaking change.

message.description: One human-readable line. Not API surface; must not be parsed.

detail.description: Remediation or specifics. Not API surface.

retryable.description: True only for transient infrastructure failures; caller errors are false.

partial.description: Non-null only for batch verbs documenting partial success; a non-null partial still exits nonzero.
